questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to SQL Block Execution Order?
options: Inefficient scaling of The compiler logical parsing order (FROM -> JOIN -> WHERE -> GROUP BY -> HAVING -> SELECT -> ORDER BY).
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of The compiler logical parsing order (FROM -> JOIN -> WHERE -> GROUP BY -> HAVING -> SELECT -> ORDER BY).
questions.explanation: The topic covers how The compiler logical parsing order (FROM -> JOIN -> WHERE -> GROUP BY -> HAVING -> SELECT -> ORDER BY) scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
